name: Urban Golf
address: 1510 Fairfield Ave suite 201, Fort Wayne, IN 46802
about: Urban Golf is a part of The Fairfield, a multi-level entertainment and dining destination located in downtown Fort Wayne, Indiana. The golf facility is situated on the second floor and features 8 simulator bays, one of which is a private lesson bay, alongside a Pro Merch store, full bar, and dining area. The venue is part of a larger complex that includes duckpin bowling, karaoke, games, and event spaces, positioning it as a hub for food, fun, and social gatherings. It offers both individual play and memberships, with professional instruction available, making it accessible for both casual visitors and dedicated golfers.
why_golfers_like_it: 8 simulator bays with a private lesson bay for professional instruction
Full bar and dining area on-site for convenience
Membership options available for regular players
Part of a larger entertainment complex with multiple activities
Private lesson bay with professional coaching

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-driven cuisine available on every floor with diverse dining options, including quick bites and coursed dinners.
Full-service bars with craft cocktails available throughout the building.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own or inquire about rental options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers chef-driven cuisine and craft cocktails on-site. BYOB policies are not mentioned, so it is likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for 18 holes. It is advisable to contact the venue directly for estimated play duration.

faq.question: Is Urban Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Fairfield welcomes all ages and types of fun, including kids' parties and family-friendly events.
